title: Firebee
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Firebees''' were creatures that lived in nests on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] inhabited the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Station]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] contended with a nest of firebees in the pilots' barracks.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi's Honor]]''
